_purpose: Collect REAL client reviews over time via the post-engagement review-request loop (Sheet 7 Gap 4).
_loop: At every engagement close: send a no-incentive review request (Clutch primary, Google Business secondary). When a REAL review arrives, log it here. /reviews/ displays only real, verifiable reviews.
_honesty: NEVER log or publish a review the firm did not actually receive. Verbatim excerpts only, with a verification/permalink URL and the client's permission to display.
_aggregate_rating_gate: AggregateRating stays OFF until N>=5 real reviews (locked rule). At N>=5, enable it from the real ratings in this log, sample size disclosed.
_schema: review_id, platform, date, service, industry, rating, excerpt, source_url, permission_to_display, on_site
_seed_note: 2 real Clutch reviews are already live on /reviews/ (inline in src/reviews.11tydata.js). Migrate their real details here as REV-0001/REV-0002 so this log is the single source of truth, then append new real reviews as the loop runs. Count today = 2 -> AggregateRating remains OFF.
